description.zh: 根据原邮件和你的要点生成礼貌、清晰的回复。
description.en: Draft a polite, clear reply from the original email and your notes.

placeholder.zh: 粘贴原邮件，再写下你想表达的要点...
placeholder.en: Paste the original email, then add your reply notes...

placeholder.zh: 例如：确认时间、拒绝需求、推进下一步
placeholder.en: Example: confirm timing, decline a request, move forward
